AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT (TRANSACTION ID # 100186550) FILED BY PETITIONER CHEN, SUSY HEARING SET FOR JAN-23-2023 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER SUSY CHEN AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT IS DENIED. REQUEST FOR LEAVE TO AMEND IS TWO-FOLD: (1) IN THE MOVING PAPERS PETITIONER SEEKS TO ADD A NEW CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CEQA; ARGUMENTS IN OPPOSITION ARE WELL-TAKEN AND PETITIONER FAILS TO ADDRESS THESE ARGUMENTS OR SUPPORT THIS REQUEST IN THE REPLY. THEREFORE, LEAVE TO AMEND TO ASSERTS A NEW CAUSE OF ACTION IS DENIED. (2) PETITIONER ALSO SEEKS TO INCLUDE NEW FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS PERTAINING TO THE EXISTING CLAIM. THIS ACTION WAS FILED ON AUGUST 8, 2022. THE FACTS GIVING RISE TO THE NEW FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS AROSE IN OCTOBER 2022. THIS REQUEST IS NOT PROPERLY BROUGHT ON A MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND. PETITIONER MAY FILE A MOTION TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL COMPLAINT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-23-2023 HEARING RE: PETITIONER SUSY CHEN'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501 TO BE HEARD ON JANUARY 30, 2023, AT 9:30 A.M. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL CASES RELATED TO REAL PROPERTY PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
REPLY DECLARATION TO OPPOSITION TO MTN FOR LEAVE TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL PLEADING (TRANSACTION ID # 100192303) FILED BY PETITIONER CHEN, SUSY

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER SUSY CHEN'S NOTICE OF MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE SUPPLEMENTAL PLEADING IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 7, 2023 FOR STATUS OF THE MOTION WITHDRAWAL REFERENCED IN THE REPLY DECLARATION. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER SUSY CHEN's Motion For Leave To Amend First Amended Petition For Writ.

Matter is transferred to department 501 to be heard on January 30, 2023, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all cases related to real property per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Amended Notice Of Motion For Leave To Amend First Amended Petition For Writ
Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Christina Garcia esq., 415.297.3109 appearing via Zoom for Plaintiff Susy Chen.
Giulia Gualco-Nelson, 415.425.6145 of the City Attorney of San Francisco appearing for Defendants City and County of San Francisco Planning Department.

Hearing held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER SUSY CHEN Amended Notice Of Motion For Leave To Amend First Amended Petition For Writ is DENIED. Request for leave to amend is two-fold:
(1) in the moving papers Petitioner seeks to add a new cause of action for CEQA; arguments in opposition are well-taken and Petitioner fails to address these arguments or support this request in the reply. Therefore, leave to amend to asserts a new cause of action is DENIED.
(2) Petitioner also seeks to include new factual allegations pertaining to the existing claim. This action was filed on August 8, 2022. The facts giving rise to the new factual allegations arose in October 2022. This request is not properly brought on a motion for leave to amend. Petitioner may file a motion to file a supplemental complaint. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
